findings.evidence: `rg` shows the only domain assumption is `Continuity.lean:47: variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E]`; Mathlib has the weaker `SeminormedAddCommGroup` extending `AddCommGroup` and `PseudoMetricSpace` at `Mathlib/Analysis/Normed/Group/Defs.lean:225-226`, while `Metric.uniformContinuous_iff` only needs pseudometric spaces at `Mathlib/Topology/MetricSpace/Pseudo/Defs.lean:758-760`.
findings.fix: Split the variables so the estimates use `{E} [AddCommGroup E] [StarAddMonoid E]`, and state `uniformContinuous_of_continuousAt_zero` under `[SeminormedAddCommGroup E] [StarAddMonoid E]`.
findings.issue: The file-level `[NormedAddCommGroup E]` makes all three public theorems less general than their proofs require: the two estimates at lines 61 and 119 only use subtraction/additive commutativity, and the upgrade at line 134 only uses the seminorm-induced pseudo-metric.

summary: The new continuity API is stated with an unnecessarily strong domain assumption. The quantitative estimates are algebraic in the domain, and the uniform-continuity upgrade only needs the seminormed pseudo-metric structure.
